Retroactive Application of Policies or Procedures Established by Secretary of Housing and Urban Development to Rights of Owners of Leased Housing, Including Right of Renewal, , , as amended by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 93–383, title II, § 20888 Stat. 669Pub. L. 95–128, title II, § 201(h)91 Stat. 1129Aug. 22, 1974Oct. 12, 1977“Nothing in this title [see Tables for classification] or any other provision of law authorizes the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development to apply any policy or procedure established by him with respect to the rights of an owner under a lease entered into under section 23 of the United States Housing Act of 1937 [], including the right to renewal of such lease to the maximum term permitted by law, if such lease was entered into prior to the effective date of such policy or procedure.”section 1421b of this title
